docTitle: Linjiila e karte · Linjiila e gite goo
metaDesc: Tokku sa'aaji Linjiila Hindi, nguurndam Yeesu, e njillaaji Pool dow karte goonga — Linjiila waɗii nder nokkuuje goonga.

s.title: Linjiila e karte
s.verse: “Ngam carel ko min kokki'on habaru bawɗe Yeesu Almasiihu Joomiraawo meeɗen e garol maako, naa' habaruuji ɗi ɗum siryii e ƴoyre min tokki. Ammaa min ngi'ii mangu maako e gite amin.” (2 Biiturus 1:16)
s.purpose: Linjiila naa' kaljungal. Ko windannde dow yimɓe njahnooɓe e nokkuuje, balɗe, e inɗe goonga. Tokku ɗii laabi dow karte, e laawol sa'a — ɗotta nokkuure, koo ɗotta ▶ ngam yaadude e maggal seese seese.
s.ot_kick: ① Linjiila Hindi — e nder sa'a
s.ot_lead: Naa' njillu gootu ammaa yiirngo daari kisingol gila tagugol: tagugol e tawegol horɓe → ilam e Baabila → noddaango (Ibraahiima) → leydi aadaandi → Yaltugol → ladde → foolugol → laamu → seedugol → horeede → artugol.
s.je_lead: Tokku nguurndam Yeesu no Linjiilaaji kabrata, e laawol — daga danyeede makko Baytalami rewrude e lootagol makko e kuugal Galili, lummbude Samaariya, haa gaafaangal, ummitaagol e ƴiwgol Urucaliima.
s.pa_h: Daga Antiyokiya haa keerol duuniyaaru — Romaaru
s.pa_lead: Daga Pentekoste Urucaliima, no Habaru Belɗum saakori gaɗa Yahuudiya — rewrude Asiya Tokoson e Oropa haa ɓernde laamu mawngu. Suɓo gootu e njillaaji joyi ɗin (aranu·ɗiɗaɓu·tataɓu + njillu haa Romaaru + ɓaawo rimɗineede) tokkaa kuuɗe Kuuɗe Lilaaɓe wondude e ɓatakuuje binndaaɗe e laawol.
s.foot: Iwdi · Nokkuuje njokkata binndol Linjiila e annal nokkuuje Linjiila (e inɗe jonaneeje ɗo ɗum nafata). Daaɗe geece, canɗi e weendeeje ummorii e keɓe nokkuuje udditiiɗe (Natural Earth), newnaaɗe.
s.contact: Naamne · miijooji — Windan min imeel

eden.name: Eden (Tagugol · Tawegol horɓe)
eden.note: Nder duuniyaaru tagaandu «moƴƴuru no feewi», hakke naati o taƴi jokkere hakkunde Allah e yimɓe.
events: Tagugol e balɗe joweegoo — «ɗum moƴƴi no feewi»
Neɗɗo tagaa e mbaadi Allah
Tawegol horɓe, e riiwgol daga Eden
Aadi Habaru Belɗum arani — «ɓiɗɗo debbo on helay hoore mboddi»

noah.name: Araraat (Ilam)
noah.note: Allah ñaawi duuniyaaru heewndu hakke, ammaa o daɗndi nguurndam e ɓeynguure wootere.
events: Duuniyaaru heewndu bone
Ilam on, e laana Nuuhu
Aadi gaawol kammu — «ilam wonataa fahin bonnude duuniyaaru»

babel.name: Suudu toowndu Baabila
babel.note: E mawnintinaare nde ɗaɓɓi kammu, Allah jiibi ɗemɗe maɓɓe o saakti leƴƴi dow leydi.
events: «Ngaɗen wuro e suudu toowndu… ngaɗen inde men»
Allah jiibi ɗemngal maɓɓe
Leƴƴi caakii dow leydi (Sineyaar — ɓaawo Baabila)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Daari kisingol Linjiila fuɗɗii e noddugol gorko gooto.
events: Allah noddi Abram daga Ur Kaldeeyankooɓe
«Mi waɗay ma lenyol mawngol… leƴƴi fuu keɓay barka e maaɗa»
E hoolaare o yalti leydi maako

haran.name: Haaraan
haran.note: E laawol, jaabotoo noddaango faade leydi aadaandi.
events: Ɓeynguure Teera hoɗi Haaraan
Teera maayi
Abram yehi Kanaana e duuɓi 75

shechem.name: Sekem · Kanaana
shechem.note: Nder leydi aadaandi, ɓeynguure sinci e aadi on nawtii jaamanuuji.
events: Naatugol Kanaana, sadakirde arande — «mi hokkay ɓiɓɓe maaɗa leydi ndi»
Aadi on (Génesis 15) · Isiyaaka · Yaaquuba
Ɓiɓɓe sappo e ɗiɗo Yaaquuba — ɗaɗol leƴƴi sappo e ɗiɗi

egypt.name: Misira (Gooseen)
egypt.note: Ɓeynguure wontii leñol mawngol — refti leñol maccuɓe.
events: Yuusufu, yeeyaaɗo, ƴawi haa laamu Misira
Ɓeynguure Yaaquuba fuu jippii ngam dogde heege
Leñol Israa'iila ɓeydiingol waɗaa maccuɓe

sinai.name: Fello Sinaa'i
sinai.note: Hisinde ɓurnde mawnude e Linjiila Hindi — maccuɓe wontii leñol Allah.
events: Bone sappo e baali Hawre Yaaltugol
Maayo Boɗeewo seeri ɓe lummbi
Sariyaaji sappo, Sariya, suudu tukuru e sadakaaji

kadesh.name: Kadees (ladde)
kadesh.note: Hoolaaki hasi jaamanu gooto leydi ndi — ammaa Allah heddii e maɓɓe.
events: Laylotooɓe sappo e ɗiɗo — ammaa yimɓe ɓen njaɓaani hoolaade
Duuɓi 38 e ladde — manna, duule e yiite
E seeno Mowaab, waaju sakkitiiwu Muusaa (Sariya Ɗiɗaɓo)

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Haa joofnde ɓe naati ɓe keɓi leydi aadaandi.
events: Maayo Urdun seeri yimɓe ɓen lummbi
Galɗe Yeriko yani
Foolugol Kanaana e senndugol leydi

shiloh.name: Siilo (Sariyaaɓe)
shiloh.note: Walaa laamɗo, koo moye waɗa ko o yiɗi — laamɗo goonga ina hatonjinaa.
events: Suudu tukuru darnaa Siilo
Yiilaango hakke–torra–hisinde (Debora, Gideyuuna, Samsuuna)
Ruutu — hoolaare e balɗe niɓɓe, e jaamanu Daawuuda

jerusalem.name: Urucaliima · Laamu woortungu
jerusalem.note: Jaamanu ɓurngu Israa'iila — e aadi laamɗo poomayankeejo.
events: Sawuula laamɗo aranɗo, refti Daawuuda e Goliyaata
Aadi Daawuuda — «jaba laamu maaɗa heddoto poomaa» (2 Samuweela 7)
Sulaymaana mahi hekkalu Urucaliima

samaria.name: Samaariya · Laamu seerngu
samaria.note: Laamu seeri ngu yahi bonude ka Annabo'en noddata.
events: Ɓaawo Sulaymaana, seedugol e Yahuuda e Israa'iila
Sujugol sanamu baɗtungol
Iliyaasu, Isaaya, Irimiyaa noddi «ngartee» — ɓe kabri Almasiihu

nineveh.name: Niinawa (Asuuriya)
nineveh.note: E ɗalugol koo rentinaango fuu, rewo on yani ko adii.
events: Niinawa, laamorde Asuuriya
Laamu rewo yani e Asuuriya (722 H.A.)
Yuunusa nulaa Niinawa

babylon.name: Baabila
babylon.note: Jemma ɓurɗo niɓɓude — ammaa aadi artugol heddii.
events: Urucaliima yani, hekkalu sumaa (586 H.A.)
Yahuuda naɓaa Baabila
Daani'eela e Hazaqiyeela — hoolaare e wahayuuji e horeede

susa.name: Suusa (Persiya)
susa.note: Koo nder ɓernde laamu kaafiri, Allah reeni leñol muuɗum.
events: Persiya fooli Baabila
Esteer hisni Yahuudiyankooɓe daga bonugol
Nehemiya du'ii yeeso laamɗo o nulaa

return.name: Artugol Urucaliima
return.note: Ɓe ngarti ɓe mahti — ammaa laamɗo waraali. Ɓe habbii Almasiihu.
events: Lummbe tati artugol e konngol Sirus (Zerubabel 538 · Ezra 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Hekkalu mahtaa e galɗe Urucaliima mahtaa
Malaaki — Linjiila Hindi joofi: «Mi lilay nelaaɗo am»

bethlehem.name: Baytalami
bethlehem.note: Almasiihu aadaaɗo on warii e wuro Daawuuda — Wolde wartuɗo neɗɗo.
events: Danyaa Baytalami, wuro Daawuuda
Malaa'ikaaɓe kabri aynaaɓe habaru on
Annduɓe koode ngari sujjude mo

nazareth.name: Naasareeta
nazareth.note: Allah mawni hono neɗɗo e wuro tinaangu.
events: Nehaa e galle labbo
E duuɓi sappo e ɗiɗi, o naamnoo o jaaboo e hekkalu
Refti o riiwaa e sinagog wuro maako

jordan.name: Maayo Urdun
jordan.note: Kuugal makko ɓannginngal fuɗɗii — kammu seedii ko o Ɓiɗɗo.
events: Yahaya looti mo
Ruuhu jippii hono foondu — «Oo ko Ɓiɗɗo am jiɗaaɗo»
O fooli jarrabuuji tati Ceyɗan e ladde

cana.name: Kaana
cana.note: E maande makko arande o hollii teddungal makko.
events: Koɗo e dewgal
Ndiyam wontii sanngara — maande makko arande
Taalibaaɓe makko kooli mo

sychar.name: Sikaar (Samaariya)
sychar.note: Laawol kuugal aranal — rewrude Urucaliima haa Samaariya nyeɗtaandu.
events: O laɓɓini hekkalu Urucaliima
Jemma, Nikodemu — «Sey a danyee kesum»
Ndiyam nguurɗam ngam debbo Samaariyaajo

capernaum.name: Kafarnahum
capernaum.note: Nokkuure kuugal Galili — noddugol, janngingol e luural fuu hawroyi ɗoo.
events: O noddi awooɓe o ñiiɓi ɗoo
Waaju dow fello — «Barkinaaɓe waasɓe e ruuhu»
Mise laamu — e luural ɓeydiingal

galilee.name: Weendu Galili
galilee.note: E bawɗe dow tageefe, o hollii ko o woni.
events: «Deƴƴu, tabbitu» — o deƴƴini henndu
O nyaamni yimɓe 5.000 e mburuuji joweo e liɗɗi ɗiɗi
O yahi dow ndiyam

caesarea_p.name: Kaysariya Filibbi
caesarea_p.note: Taalibaaɓe ɓen faami ko o Almasiihu, e laawol gaafaangal udditii.
events: Qirritaango Biiturus — «Aan a Almasiihu, Ɓiɗɗo Allah guuruɗo on»
O adii habrude mayde makko e ummitaagol makko
O waylii mbaadi e teddungal dow fello

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: E laawol ƴawgol Urucaliima, o ɗaɓɓi majjuɓe ɓen.
events: O hokki gite bumɗo Bartimee
O noddi Zakkee mooɓtoowo lampo
«Ɓiɗɗo Neɗɗo warii ɗaɓɓude e hisinde majjuɓe ɓen»

bethany.name: Betaniya
bethany.note: O hollii bawɗe makko dow mayde ko adii yontere makko sakkitiinde.
events: O ummtini Laasar daga yanaande — «Min woni ummitaagol e nguurndam»
Maryama wuji mo ngam ubbugol makko
Maande nde ɓeydi pewje ngam warde mo

jerusalem.name: Urucaliima
jerusalem.note: Joofnde nde Linjiila fuu joopii — gaafaangal, ummitaagol, ƴiwgol.
events: Naatugol jaalal; o waylitii taabuuje hekkalu fahin
E Hiraande Sakkitiinde o looti koyɗe taalibaaɓe
O maayi dow gaafaangal
Ummitii nyalaande tataɓere, refti o ƴiwi

antioch.name: Antiyokiya
antioch.note: Fedde diina nuloore ɗo misiyon leƴƴi fuɗɗii e artata.
events: E du'aa Ruuhu senndi Barnabas e Sawulu
Fedde ɗo hoolaaɓe njeetaa «Almasiyankooɓe» ko adii
Fuɗɗorde njillaaji aranu, ɗiɗaɓu e tataɓu

seleucia.name: Seleusiya
seleucia.note: Marsa Antiyokiya — ɓe ƴaɓɓori laana faade Sipar.

salamis.name: Salamis (Sipar)
salamis.note: Darorde arande e Sipar — waajagol e sinagogaaji.

paphos.name: Paafos
paphos.note: Bawɗe kollaa e ɓen luutndiiɓe Habaru Belɗum.
events: Elimas mbileejo waɗaa bumɗo
Serjiyus Poolus guwarneer on hooli
Gila ɗoo «Pool» ardii

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Marsa e Pamfiliya — ɗoo Yahaya Markus rutti caggal.

pantioch.name: Antiyokiya Pisidiya
events: Waaju juutɗo dow daari hisinde e sinagog
Leƴƴi keewɗi mbelii ɓe njaɓi Wolde on
Riiwaa sabu luural

iconium.name: Ikoniyum
iconium.note: Heewɓe kooli, ammaa torra waɗi ɓe njokka yaadu.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Jantoraa hono reweteeɗo, refti firaa kaaƴe.
events: O sellini gorko mo koyɗe njahaayɗe gila danyeede
Jamaa on eɓɓii hirsande ɓe hono reweteeɓe
Firaa kaaƴe accaa hono maayɗo, o ummii

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Taalibaaɓe heewɓe mbaɗaa; ɓe ngartiri laawol ngam semmbinde fedde'en.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Nokkuure baylitaare ɗo Habaru Belɗum adii faade Oropa.
events: Wahayu gorko Makedoniya
«Lummbu ngaru wallaa min»
Law ɓe lummbi naati Oropa

philippi.name: Filibbi
philippi.note: Fedde arande Oropa — Habaru Belɗum fooli koo nder kaso.
events: Lidiya, jeeyoowo comci teddungal, hooli
Korɗo debbo bileejo rimɗinaa
Gimɗe manoore feccere jemma, dillere leydi, ɓeynguure deenoowo kaso hisaa

thess.name: Tesalonika
thess.note: Wolde on dimbini wuro ngo e luural saroyi.
events: O yeewti e sinagog balɗe fooftere tati
«Ɓee firtunooɓe duuniyaaru»
Ɓe njalti jemma

berea.name: Bereya
berea.note: «Tedduɓe» ɓen ndaartoyi Wolde on ko'e maɓɓe.
events: Ɓe njaɓi Wolde on e yiɗɗe
Nyalɗe fuu ɓe wiɗitii Binndi Ceniiɗi ngam ƴeewde ɗum
Heewɓe kooli

athens.name: Atina
athens.note: E wuro annduɓe hikima o saakti «reweteeɗo mo anndaaka».
events: Wuro heewngo sanamuuji naawni ɓernde makko
Dow Areyopagus o waaji dow Taguɗo on e ummitaagol
Jalaa, ammaa seeɗa kooli

corinth.name: Korinti
corinth.note: O hoɗi hitaande e feccere, o sinci fedde e wuro heewngo bone.
events: O nyeha tenti wondude e Akila e Piriskilla
«Hoto hulu… ko mi wondi e maaɗa»
Korintiyankooɓe heewɓe kooli ɓe lootaa

ephesus.name: Efesus
ephesus.note: Ɓernde njillu tataɓu — Wolde on saakii e Asiya.
events: Janngingol nyalɗe fuu duuɓi ɗiɗi e galle Tiranus
Defte mbileeku cumaa; kuuɗe bawɗe mawɗe
Demetiriyus baɗoowo kaalis ummini fitina

miletus.name: Mileetus
miletus.note: Salminaango e gonɗi e mawɓe fedde Efesus.
events: «Ndeenee fedde nde o soodiri ƴiiƴam makko»
Mawɓe ɓen mbojji, anndude ɓe ngiitataa mo fahin

caesarea.name: Kaysariya
caesarea.note: Duuɓi ɗiɗi o daɗndi Habaru Belɗum yeeso guwarneeruuɓe e laamɗo.
events: Kiiteeji yeeso guwarneeruuɓe Feliks e Festus
Wullitaango makko yeeso laamɗo Agriippa
«Mi wullitoo to Kaysar» — faade Romaaru

jerusalem.name: Urucaliima
jerusalem.note: Nanngaa e hekkalu, laawol makko hono dahaaɗo fuɗɗii.
events: Nanngaa e jamaa on nder hekkalu
O wullitii hoore makko yeeso mooɓndiral
Hono ɓiɗɗo leydi Romaaru, o nulaa e deenaango faade Kaysariya

myra.name: Miira
myra.note: Ɓe eggi e laana Alesandiriya faade Romaaru.

fairhaven.name: Marsaaji Moƴƴi (Kereeta)
fairhaven.note: Rentinaango Pool ngam dartaade dogaango laana on heɗaaka.

crete.name: Kereeta
crete.note: Ɓaawo rimɗineede makko, duungal ngal o accani Titus feewnude fedde'en.
events: O acci Titus ngam suɓaade mawɓe e kala wuro
O noddi ardiiɓe ɓe ella alaa, hoolniiɓe
O windani Titus ɓataku on

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Rewrude e henndu mawndu e helde laana, aadi Allah tabbiti.
events: Henndu saɗtundu heli laana, ammaa yimɓe 276 fuu ndaɗi
Mboddi ñaami mo, ammaa huunde memaani mo
O sellini nawnaaɓe duungal ngal

syracuse.name: Sirakus
syracuse.note: Ɓe njooɗii balɗe tati e Sisiliya.

puteoli.name: Puteyoli
puteoli.note: Ɓe njippii Itali ɓe kawri e siɗɗiraaɓe hoolaaɓe.

rome.name: Romaaru
rome.note: Habaru Belɗum yottii ɓernde laamu mawngu haa joofnde — naa' timmere ammaa fuɗɗorde.
events: Duuɓi ɗiɗi uddaaɗo e galle, o saakti laamu ngun e cuusal
Gila ɗoo o winditii Ɓatakuuje Kaso (Aafisanko'en · Filibiyanko'en · Koloosiyanko'en · Filemon)
Refti o dahaa fahin, o windi 2 Timooti o waraa sabu goonga — «Mi haɓii haɓannde moƴƴere nden, mi timmini dogngu ngun»
